name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A mutual (two-way) non-disclosure agreement for both parties to protect confidential information shared during business discussions or collaborations.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: A cover page template to accompany the Mutual NDA, capturing the parties' details, effective date, and key deal terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A comprehensive standard agreement for cloud-hosted software services, covering subscription terms, acceptable use, data handling, warranties, and liability.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for companies engaging design partners during early-stage product development, covering feedback obligations, IP ownership, confidentiality, and early access terms.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines the service levels, uptime commitments, scheduled maintenance windows, and remedies (e.g. service credits) for cloud or hosted software services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A standard agreement governing professional services engagements, covering scope of work, deliverables, payment terms, IP ownership, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: An agreement governing data processing activities on behalf of a data controller, designed to meet GDPR, CCPA, and other data protection law requirements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard agreement for licensing software to customers, covering grant of license, restrictions, support, warranties, liability limits, and termination.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard commercial partnership agreement between two companies, covering partnership scope, revenue sharing, exclusivity, branding, and termination rights.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: An agreement for limited-scope pilot programs before full commercial deployment, covering the evaluation period, success criteria, fees, data use, and transition to production terms.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant business associate agreement for vendors handling protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity, covering permitted uses, safeguards, and breach obligations.

name: AI Addendum
description: A modular addendum to attach to existing agreements to address AI-specific terms, including data use for model training, output accuracy disclaimers, and AI governance obligations.
